## Summary

Enforces template-required surface parity across webpage, PDF, DOCX, and TXT. Replaces `Pass/Revise/Not Ready` verdict with `Market Ready / Near Market Ready / Not Market Ready`. Adds AI-diagnosed genre and target audience fields to all surfaces. Fixes PDF cover page overflow and adds missing DOCX Confidence Explanation section.

## Scope

**Touched:**
- `app/api/reports/[jobId]/download/route.ts` — verdict wording, DOCX Confidence Explanation, PDF CSS, genre/audience in metadata + all builders
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — verdict badge, genre diagnosis, target audience field
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/prompts/pass3-synthesis.ts` — `diagnosed_genre` + `target_audience` in enrichment schema
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/runPass3Synthesis.ts` — extract new enrichment fields from LLM output
- `lib/evaluation/pipeline/types.ts` — add `diagnosed_genre` + `target_audience` to enrichment type
- `docs/templates/evaluation/short-form-evaluation-template.md` — `Verdict` → `Market Readiness` + `Target Audience`
- `docs/templates/evaluation/long-form-evaluation-template.md` — same

**Out of scope:** Evaluation pipeline logic, scoring algorithm, template completeness gate (already merged in #1006).

## Tests Updated

No new tests — rendering changes verified via `npx tsc --noEmit` (zero errors). Existing download parity gate (`validateDownloadParity`) covers structural completeness.

N/A — no UI screenshots; changes are to download builders and metadata fields. Verified via TypeScript compilation.

N/A — metadata field additions follow existing dl/dt/dd pattern.

N/A — server-side rendering changes only.

N/A — no CI/infra changes.

Revert commit. All changes are additive (new fields render conditionally when data is available).

Evaluation report rendering (all 4 surfaces). Pass 3 synthesis prompt (new enrichment fields).

N/A — no database schema changes. Pipeline enrichment type extended with optional fields.

N/A — no schema changes.

## Unauthorized Input Sources

LLM enrichment output (`diagnosed_genre`, `target_audience`) — validated as string type, trimmed, displayed via `escapeHtml()` in PDF and safe JSX in webpage.

## Internal Process Leakage

N/A — no internal process details exposed.

## Input → Action → Output

Evaluation artifact `enrichment.diagnosed_genre` / `enrichment.target_audience` → rendered in title block → user sees genre + audience in report header.

## Public-Safe Quality/Status Metrics

N/A — no new metrics exposed.

## Runtime/Pipeline Expansion

Pass 3 prompt expanded by ~400 chars (genre + audience instructions). No new API calls. No latency impact.

## Latency Impact

No latency impact — prompt expansion is negligible (~400 chars added to existing prompt).

## Evaluation Process Change Declaration

Process Change: no

Pass selection (check exactly one):

- [ ] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [x] Pass 3

- [x] Sequential phase-gate doctrine preserved (parallelism only within safe sub-workloads).
- [x] Phase 0 remains first and is proven before downstream processing.
- [x] Phase 2 remains blocked on accepted_story_ledger_v1 (Review Gate authority).
- [x] Phase 3 remains blocked on pass12_handoff_v1 and is sole owner of Pass 3B synthesis.
- [x] Deterministic quality gates run after Pass 3B and before completion.
- [x] WAVE remains post-evaluation (after evaluation_result_v2) and non-fatal to base evaluation.

One-line doctrine: The pipeline is sequential at the phase/gate level and parallel only inside safe sub-workloads.

## Contract Integrity

Template contracts updated to reflect Market Readiness wording. Rendering contract preserved — all 14 required sections render unconditionally.

## Behavioral Quality

This PR is not reducing intelligence. Pass 3 enrichment prompt now requests genre diagnosis and target audience — additive behavioral improvement.

## Latency Evidence

N/A — prompt-only change, no new API calls.

## Quality Gate / Anomalies

QG_none — no quality gate changes. Existing `validateDownloadParity` gate remains active.

## Risk

Low — all new fields are optional with graceful fallbacks. Verdict wording change is cosmetic. PDF CSS change removes a constraint (min-height) rather than adding one.

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Existing evaluations won't have `diagnosed_genre` or `target_audience` until re-evaluated — field renders conditionally, no blank space shown.
- Genre fallback filters "novel" and "short story" as format words — edge case if a real genre contains these words (unlikely).

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: false — Pass 3 prompt expanded with `diagnosed_genre` and `target_audience` enrichment fields. No new API calls or processing steps.
